stereotype: Architect ruling — addendum to operationsManager and webClient; not a standalone primary contract
volatility: Operations-console READ path gap: how the UC4 SPA OperationsConsole reads operated-system status (RuntimePhase, SLO rows, health snapshot, autoscaler decision history, hosting cost) — no Client-facing read path existed; the underlying reads were internal Manager Activities only.
dataContracts: OperatedSystemView { OperatedAppID; Phase RuntimeStatusSeam; InFlight bool; Health HealthSnapshotView; Slos []SloRowView; RecentEvents []RuntimeStatusEventView; Autoscaler AutoscalerView; CurrentRunRate Money }
HealthSnapshotView { SloMet bool; Detail string; Phase RuntimeStatusSeam }
SloRowView { Component string; Objective string; SloMet bool; Healthy bool }
RuntimeStatusEventView { At time.Time; From RuntimeStatusSeam; To RuntimeStatusSeam; Note string }
AutoscaleDecisionView { At time.Time; Action AutoscaleAction; Reason string; Published bool }
errorModel: Not specified; follows operationsManager and webClient error models.
idempotency: QueryOperatedSystemView workflow id: {operatedAppId}:view:{requestId}; USE_EXISTING conflict policy. Pure read, no mutation.

revisions.summary: RULING: Option 1 chosen. operationsManager gains new public op QueryOperatedSystemView (short-lived read-only Temporal Workflow, composes existing read Activities: ReadOperatedSystemActivity + GetApplicationHealthActivity + GetSloStatusActivity + autoscaler decision history + operationEstimationEngine.ProjectForOperatedApp run-rate, no new RA/Engine). webClient gains second contract IWebReadModel with first op readOperatedSystemView(operatedAppId, requestId). New HTTP route GET /api/v1/operations/{operatedAppId}/view. IWebEntry (4 ops) untouched. webClient now 2/2 contracts (ceiling). operationsManager goes 5→6 public ops. Options rejected: direct SPA→Grafana/Prometheus read (breaks closed-layering + leaks observability substrate); out-of-band read projection (no head-state projection exists for operated runtime status).
